title: Click Mining Forever
description: Click mining, for the modern era (of Beta Minecraft)
body:
# Click Mining Forever

> _So, way back before Beta 1.3 or so, there was a thing known as click mining. When you finished destroying a block, if you quickly released and pressed the left mouse button again, you'd start destroying the next block slightly quicker, skipping the delay._
> 
> _Jeb, however, fixed this by moving the delay from after destroying a block to before destroying a block._

Click Mining Forever aims to completely nullify this delay, speeding up mining everywhere.
